# Common Module Context

<!-- Generated by: agent-context-manager.md -->
<!-- Generated on: 2025-10-24 -->
<!-- Source: hybrid -->
<!-- Level: lower-level -->

## 1. Project Overview & Purpose

The common module provides reusable UI components, shared hooks, utilities, global styles, and web workers used across all feature modules. This module establishes the design system foundation and shared functionality for the application.

## 2. Core Technologies & Stack

- **Language**: JavaScript/JSX and TypeScript
- **Framework**: React 19
- **Styling**: SCSS Modules and CSS Modules
- **Dependencies**:
  - `@fortawesome/react-fontawesome` - Icon library
  - `react-toastify` - Toast notifications
  - `dayjs` - Date formatting
  - `comlink` - Web Worker communication
- **Build**: Vite with CSS Module support

## 3. Architecture and Design Patterns

- **Component Library Pattern**: Reusable presentational components
- **Custom Hooks Pattern**: Shared behavioral logic in hooks
- **CSS Modules Pattern**: Scoped styles prevent conflicts
- **Design Tokens**: Centralized variables for colors, spacing, typography
- **Web Workers**: Offload computation to background threads via Comlink
- **Composition**: Components designed for flexibility and reusability

## 4. Code Style and Conventions

- **Naming**: @vibing/rules/common/data/data-attribute-naming-conventions.md
- **TypeScript**: @vibing/rules/common/foundation/typescript-guidelines.md
- **React**: @vibing/rules/react/react-best-practices.md
- **Component Guidelines**: @vibing/rules/react/component-guidelines.md
- **General**: @vibing/rules/common/foundation/general-rules.md

## 5. Component/Module Responsibilities

### components/ (Shared UI Components)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Reusable presentational components used across feature modules
- **Key Components**:
  - `Forms/` - Form controls (Input, Select, Checkbox, etc.)
  - `Model/` - Modal dialog component
  - `ConfirmationModel/` - Confirmation dialog
  - `LoadingIndicator/` - Loading spinner
  - `LoadingOverlay/` - Full-screen loading overlay
  - `Navbar/` - Application navigation bar
  - `UserMenu/` - User account menu
  - `PopupMenu/` - Generic popup menu component
  - `ProgressBar/` - Progress visualization
  - `TagList/` - Tag display component
  - `ServiceFilters/` - Service filtering controls
  - `ServiceTotals/` - Service hour totals display
  - `TargetFilters/` - Target filtering controls
  - `TimeFrameFilters/` - Date range filters
  - `UserFilterBuilder/` - User filter builder
  - `ComponentError/` - Error boundary component
  - `NotificationMessage/` - Toast notification wrapper
- **Pattern**:
  - Props-based configuration
  - Controlled components where applicable
  - Accessible markup (ARIA attributes)
  - TypeScript props interfaces
- **Rules**:
  - @vibing/rules/react/component-guidelines.md
  - @vibing/rules/react/react-best-practices.md

### context/ (React Context)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Global application state via Context API
- **Key Files**:
  - `configContext.jsx` - Application configuration context
- **Pattern**: Context + Provider pattern for global state
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/state-management.md

### hooks/ (Custom Hooks)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Reusable behavioral logic and side effects
- **Key Hooks**:
  - `useDetectOutsideClick.js` - Detect clicks outside element
  - `useIsServiceMutationDisabled.js` - Service mutation state
  - `useListSelector.jsx` - List selection management
  - `useObjectFilters.js` - Object filtering logic
  - `useScreenSize.js` - Responsive breakpoint detection
- **Pattern**: Extract reusable logic, return state and handlers
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/hooks-guidelines.md

### styles/ (Global Styles)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Global style definitions, design tokens, and CSS utilities
- **Key Files**:
  - `variables.module.css` - CSS custom properties (colors, spacing, etc.)
  - `global.module.css` - Global styles and resets
  - `animations.module.css` - Reusable animations
  - `headers.module.css` - Header styling utilities
  - `screen-sizes.module.css` - Responsive breakpoint definitions
  - `scrollbar.module.css` - Custom scrollbar styles
  - `sharedStyles.module.css` - Common utility classes
  - `sho-table.module.scss` - Table styling
  - `styles.js` - JavaScript style utilities
- **Pattern**: CSS Modules exported for consumption
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/styling-guidelines.md

### workers/ (Web Workers)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Background processing for computationally intensive tasks
- **Key Workers**:
  - `serviceWorker.ts` - Service hour calculations and aggregations
  - `targetWorker.ts` - Target progress calculations
- **Pattern**: Comlink for transparent async communication
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/performance-optimization.md

### utils/ (Utilities)

- **Responsible Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Purpose**: Shared utility functions
- **Key Files**:
  - `dateFormats.js` - Date formatting constants and utilities
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/common/foundation/general-rules.md

## 6. Testing Guidelines

- **Strategy**: @vibing/rules/common/testing/test-general.md
- **Framework**: Vitest + React Testing Library
- **Test Patterns**:
  - Component tests verify rendering and interactions
  - Hook tests use `renderHook` utility
  - Test accessibility (ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation)
  - Mock web workers in tests
  - Use `test-utils/` for test wrappers
- **Coverage**: Focus on reusable components and hooks

## 7. Security Considerations

- **XSS Prevention**: React escapes content automatically
- **Input Validation**: Form components should validate inputs
- **Sanitization**: Sanitize user-generated content before display
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/common/foundation/error-handling-guidelines.md

## 8. Configuration

- **Theme Variables**: CSS custom properties in `styles/variables.module.css`
- **Breakpoints**: Responsive breakpoints in `styles/screen-sizes.module.css`
- **Icons**: FontAwesome icon library loaded in core App

## 9. Common Tasks

### Creating a New Shared Component

- **Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Steps**:
  1. Create component directory in `components/[ComponentName]/`
  2. Create `index.jsx` or `index.tsx` for component implementation
  3. Create `[componentName].module.scss` for styles
  4. Define TypeScript props interface
  5. Implement accessible markup (ARIA attributes)
  6. Export from `components/index.js`
  7. Write component tests
  8. Document props and usage
- **Rules**:
  - @vibing/rules/react/component-guidelines.md
  - @vibing/rules/react/react-best-practices.md

### Creating a Custom Hook

- **Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Steps**:
  1. Create hook file in `hooks/use[HookName].js`
  2. Implement hook logic with React hooks
  3. Return state and handlers
  4. Document parameters and return values
  5. Write hook tests with `renderHook`
  6. Use in components
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/hooks-guidelines.md

### Adding Design Token

- **Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Steps**:
  1. Add CSS custom property in `styles/variables.module.css`
  2. Follow naming convention (--color-_, --spacing-_, --font-\*)
  3. Use throughout application via `var(--token-name)`
  4. Update documentation
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/styling-guidelines.md

### Creating Web Worker

- **Agent**: @vibing/agents/frontend-engineer.md
- **Steps**:
  1. Create worker file in `workers/[workerName].ts`
  2. Export functions to be called from main thread
  3. Use Comlink's `expose()` to expose API
  4. Create worker proxy in main thread with Comlink's `wrap()`
  5. Use async/await to call worker functions
  6. Test worker separately and in integration
- **Rules**: @vibing/rules/react/performance-optimization.md
